{{Quote|I commend your gunnery crew, Captain Sankaran.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Demmings]]|<ref name="Empire 35">[[Empire 35|''Empire'' 35]]</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Sankaran''' was an officer in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military, a lean man whose close-cropped hair had gone gray, but who retained a dark moustache that hung down on either side of his mouth to the line of his jaw.

==Biography==
Eight months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was serving aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']], holding an important position under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Demmings]].

During this time, Sankaran appeared baffled by a series of failures in ''Reprisal''{{'s}} gunnery when the ship was serving under [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] direct command, but this was later revealed to be due to the treachery of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Garil Dox]], and he may, like Vader and Demmings, have been aware of his subordinate's treachery all along.

Sankaran held the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]], but it is not clear whether this was a relatively senior line command rank in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], in which case he is likely to have been Demmings' executive officer, or or the lower rank of the same name used by elements of the military like the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] and [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]].

==Behind the scenes==
The plot of [[Empire 35|''A Model Officer'']] hinges on the treachery of Garil Dox, an [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] serving with ''Reprisal''{{'s}} gunnery division. Sankaran is evidently his superior, his role in this story being mainly to interface between the [[Data pit|crew pit]] and Commander Demmings, who is serving as the Star Destroyer's captain. However, Demmings almost undoubtedly holds a rank above [[Captain of the Line/Legends|Captain of the Line]], and it is not unknown for senior personnel to base themselves in the crew pits as Sankaran does here; so in the absence of categorical evidence, it is impossible to say for sure exactly what rank and role he held.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 35|''Empire'' 35]] {{1st}}
